title: justicia scandens
intro: Justicia scandens, also known as creeping gold or blue justicia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Justicia scandens include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Justicia scandens can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions.
